title: metrosideros pumila
intro: Metrosideros pumila, also known as the 'red rimu,' is a small to medium-sized tree native to New Zealand. Its wood and leaves have been used in traditional Maori medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Metrosideros pumila include its ability to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Metrosideros pumila can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to create topical creams and ointments for skin conditions and wound care.
